recent_calls.summary: The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Larita Hudson called to request an earlier service appointment for her air conditioner, which is not cooling properly, as she is on oxygen and the house is very hot. The agent confirmed her details, noted the urgency, and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Larita declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call.

The call was initiated by the user who identified themselves as Roper from American Home Shield and mentioned a desk number. The agent greeted the user but the call was disconnected shortly after reaching voicemail.
The user requested to speak to Nicole, and the agent transferred the call successfully to the appropriate person. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user, Mark from American Home Shield, called to request an urgent air conditioning service for member Bessie Williams due to a sick child. The agent confirmed the service details, including the address and preferred appointment window within 1-2 business days, and collected contact information for follow-up. The user expressed interest in maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the agent's responsiveness.
The user requested to be connected to the heating and cooling department and was successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Paul called to schedule a summer air conditioning tune-up appointment for Tuesday afternoon, May 12th, and clarified his service address and role as the property owner. The agent confirmed the details and informed Paul of available slots on April 21st, but Paul insisted on May 12th and requested to be transferred to a live associate. The call ended with a successful transfer to an associate.

The user called to check on the status of their financing application. The agent informed the user that they cannot access approval details directly but will forward the request to the appropriate team for follow-up. The user confirmed the details of their financing plan and requested to be updated once the status is confirmed.

The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user, Paul, called to schedule an annual summer checkup for his HVAC unit with no specific concerns. The agent informed him that the preferred time slot on Tuesday, May 12th was unavailable and asked for alternative dates. The call ended abruptly after the user mentioned a location and attempted to get the agent's attention multiple times.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and completed the transfer promptly.

Janelle from American Home Shield called to request a repair service for an air conditioning unit that is not turning on or cooling. The agent confirmed the details, including the home warranty dispatch number and preferred service timing of today or tomorrow, and informed that the Budget team will reach out soon to schedule the appointment. The user declined information about maintenance programs and was asked for feedback before the call ended.

The user called to inquire about the approximate time of Rich's visit scheduled for tomorrow. The agent was unable to provide the exact time but assured that a team member would follow up to confirm the timing. The call ended with the user thanking the agent and no further requests.

The user called to discuss an issue related to air conditioning billing with the technician who serviced them. The agent was unable to access billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a representative. The agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist the user further.

The user called looking for a person named CG. The agent clarified that they do not have direct access to individual staff members but offered to pass along a message. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.

Kevin Kibrak called to check the timeline for an AC service claim submitted through American Home Shield, requesting service for the next day. The agent confirmed details and informed Kevin that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. Kevin declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to request service for a non-cooling air conditioning system through their home warranty and requested a Saturday morning appointment. The agent collected all necessary information, including the dispatch number, and confirmed the details with the user. The call ended after the user disconnected before responding to the offer for home maintenance program information.
No conversation happened.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly without any meaningful interaction or assistance provided by the agent.

Judith from Home Shield called to clarify a work order regarding extra fees for rooftop access to an HVAC system at a duplex. The agent confirmed the details and assured Judith that the question would be passed to the team for follow-up. Judith provided the customer's phone number for further contact and confirmed the summary was correct.

The user, Heidi, called to follow up on a visit and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The agent confirmed the reason for the call and successfully transferred Heidi to the appropriate representative.

The user called to check on the status of a scheduled appointment and whether the technician was on the way. The agent attempted to gather details but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak to a live human agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

Heidi called to discuss a follow-up regarding her air conditioner, which was not cooling and was frozen outside. She requested a callback from a technician to determine if a service visit is needed. The agent confirmed the details and offered information about maintenance programs, which Heidi accepted, and she provided positive feedback about the call.

The user called to confirm the time of a scheduled appointment. The agent confirmed the appointment with technician Cole for Thursday, April 16th, between 11 AM and 12 PM, and the user had no further questions or requests. The call ended after confirming the appointment details.

Philip called to inquire about financing options for a new air conditioning unit upgrade. The agent scheduled a provisional appointment for April 20th at 12 PM to discuss financing and upgrade options. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback.

Lorraine called to request a cleaning service for her air conditioner, kitchen, and furnace. The agent booked an appointment for Tuesday at 10 AM and confirmed the details with Lorraine. The call ended positively with Lorraine providing a five-star rating for the service.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to inquire about rescheduling their appointment to an earlier time. The agent confirmed the current appointment details and submitted a request for an earlier appointment on the user's behalf. The call ended after the user declined further assistance.

The user called to inquire about a heating and cooling appointment for a residential property managed by their company. The agent gathered necessary details and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance due to the urgency expressed by the user. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user, Chance Gaston, called to inquire about an ETA for a service at Vivian but had no appointment found in the system. The user decided to have someone else call instead of leaving a message or being transferred. The call ended without further action.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called after receiving a missed call regarding a recent service related to heating and cooling. The agent attempted to assist but the user requested to speak with someone else, leading to a transfer to a live agent.

Lorraine called to schedule a routine furnace cleaning covered by her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the appointment details for the morning of Monday, April 21st, and Lorraine declined additional information about maintenance programs. The call ended positively with Lorraine providing excellent feedback on the agent's service.

Preston Gear called to report that his AC is not working and requested a service appointment. The agent attempted to confirm details but made errors in the summary, leading Preston to request transfer to a live agent for further assistance. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent.

Brad called to schedule a routine AC tune-up and initially requested Friday, April 17th, but was informed the earliest available slots were on April 20th. He then requested Friday, April 24th at 8 AM. The agent attempted to confirm the new date but was unable to finalize the booking and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Chamille called to inquire about the technician's appointment time for her furnace service. The agent initially found an appointment scheduled for April 20th but Chamille corrected it to April 15th. The agent assured Chamille that the team would review and update the appointment details and reach out to her.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent who could assist further.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user, Candace, called back and the agent, Sophie, attempted to connect her with a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another agent.

The user, Latra Mauser, called to request cooling system service under their American Home Shield home warranty due to a smell when the system runs. The agent collected the dispatch number, service address, and contact information, confirmed the details, and the user rated the experience positively. The call ended with the user providing feedback and no further issues.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called back in response to a message and informed the agent that they had canceled the service call. The agent then transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called back to schedule an AC tune-up under their American Home Shield home warranty plan. The agent confirmed the details, including the earliest available appointment and the request for a filter change, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user returned a call and the agent attempted to connect them with a live agent by transferring the call. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another live agent successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to confirm the time of a scheduled cooling service appointment on April 20th. The agent verified the user's details and informed them that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out to confirm the appointment time. The user expressed mild interest in maintenance programs and provided feedback rating the AI assistant a 3, preferring to speak with a real person.

Chad Hughes called to schedule an AC service appointment through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the issue with the outside unit not turning on and collected all necessary details, including the dispatch number. Chad declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the AI assistant.
